{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323014436B3777BA2353B2E17D3B8"}"},"total":90},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7454951128757764926","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"本书，描写事物较为细腻，内容逻辑清晰，角色塑造立体。能感受到人对未知探索时的恐惧与兴奋，恰如其分的结合，并且对一些事物做了隐晦处理，可以便于青少年及学生阅读。总而言之，写的非常赞，希望作者可以继续努力[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735744173,"group_id":"7404012019759713305","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"茫茫人海，幸而与你相逢，满心皆是欢喜","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxO5hjIyIBGtsodK6Hbrg3PiCp4nfhyJNvNh7cr3Gwpa","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2f91eaecb8264764b13efde2de1fd149~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793613&x-signature=AipVIRu8TxPEaJlUjlpeFAD7wI8%3D","user_id":"1011987417139783","user_name":"幸逢此缘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1011987417139783","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7404012019759713305","book_info":{"abstract":"收容物，克苏鲁，基金会架构，第一人称，比较慢热，主角san值很高，主要作为一个见证者存在，见证众生像，见证灾与祸，见证人类的挣扎与勇气
主要故事围绕各种收容物及相关事件，主角在经历一系列人和事之后，从抵触到认可，再到主动将危险隔绝在人类之前。
